PURPOSE: Recommended custom proficiency perks & refinement order for each vocation's best weapons.

Suggestions here are optimal for majority of players and level ranges, however, niche setups or extreme outliers may benefit slightly from different perks.

To ask for further advice or make suggestions - join our Discord.


Best Perk:
  • +x% of your highest combat skill as extra damage for your spells

Alternatives:
  • +x% damage against Bestiary category
  • +x% damage against targets above 95% hit points (solo only)
  1. +3 hit points on hit (1st column)
  2. Don't bother - save your dust
  1. +3% life leech (1st column)
  2. +2% mana leech (3rd column)
  1. +12.5% critical extra damage for Eternal Winter (3rd column)
  2. +1 Magic Level (1st column)
  1. +1 Magic Level (2nd column)
  2. N/A (Everything else is too good)
Best Perk:
  • +x% of your highest combat skill as extra damage for your spells
Alternatives:
  • +x% damage against Bestiary category
  • +x% damage against targets above 95% hit points (solo only)
  1. +5.00% of your Axe/Club/Sword Fighting as extra damage for auto-attacks (2nd column)
  2. +10% critical extra damage for Executioner's Throw (3rd column)
  1. +1 Axe/Club/Sword Fighting (1st column)
  2. +5% life leech for Executioner's Throw (2nd column)
  1. +1 Axe/Club/Sword Fighting (1st column)
  2. +5% life leech for Berserk (2nd column)
  1. +5.00% of your Axe/Club/Sword Fighting as extra damage for auto-attacks (2nd column)
  2. +1 Axe/Club/Sword Fighting (1st column)
  1. +1 Axe/Club/Sword Fighting (1st column)
  2. +5% life leech for Fierce Berserk (2nd column)
  1. +2 Shielding (2nd column)
  2. Homing Missile (3rd column)
  1. +1 Axe/Club/Sword Fighting (2nd column)
  2. Homing Missile (3rd column)
Best Perks:
  • (bow) +x% of your highest combat skill as extra damage for your spells
  • (bow) +x% of your highest combat skill as extra damage for your auto-attacks
  • (crossbow) +x% critical extra damage for auto-attacks
Alternatives:
  • (bow) +x% damage against Bestiary category
  • (bow) +x% critical extra damage for auto-attacks
  • (bow) +x% damage against targets above 95% hit points (solo only)
  • (bow) +x% critical extra damage for Ethereal Barrage
  1. +1 Distance Fighting (4th column)
  2. Don't bother - save your dust
  1. +20 hit points on kill (2nd column)
  2. +1 Distance Fighting (1st column)
  1. +75.00% of your Magic Level as extra healing for your spells, except heal-over-time spells (2nd column)
  2. +1 Distance Fighting (1st column)
  1. 5% life leech for Divine Caldera (2nd column)
  2. +1 Distance Fighting (1st column)
  1. +1 Distance Fighting (2nd column)
  2. N/A (Everything else is too good)
  1. +1 Distance Fighting (1st column)
  2. +10 hit points on hit (2nd column)
  1. +1 Distance Fighting (1st column)
  2. 5% life leech for Divine Caldera (2nd column)
  1. +1 Distance Fighting (2nd column)
  2. +2% mana leech (4th column)
Best Perk:
  • +x% of your highest combat skill as extra damage for your spells
Alternatives:
  • +x% damage against Bestiary category
  • +x% critical hit chance for Death Echo
  • +x% damage against targets above 95% hit points (solo only)
  1. +3 hit points on hit (1st column)
  2. Don't bother - save your dust
  1. +1% critical hit chance for offensive runes (4th column)
  2. +7.50% critical extra damage for Death spells and runes (1st column)
  1. +2 Fire Magic Level (5th column)
  2. +1 Magic Level (1st column)
  1. +2.5% critical hit chance for Sudden Death Rune (5th column)
  2. +1 Magic Level (2nd column)
Best Perk:
  • +x% of your highest combat skill as extra damage for your spells
Alternatives:
  • +x% damage against Bestiary category
  • +x% damage against targets above 95% hit points (solo only)
  • +x% base damage for Chained Penance (VoJ 3x chain rotation only)
  • +x% crit chance Thousand Fist Blows (VoH T2 TFB rotation only)
  1. +1% critical hit chance for Flurry of Blows (4th column)
  2. Don't bother - save your dust
  1. +1% critical hit chance for Flurry of Blows (4th column)
  2. Don't bother - save your dust
  1. +1 Fist Fighting (1st column)
  2. +5% life leech for Chained Penance (2nd column)
  1. For Solo Remove: +2.50% damage against targets below 30% hit points (4th column)
    For Teamhunt Remove: +10% damage against targets above 95% hit points (4th column)
  2. +70.00% of your magic level as extra healing for you spells (5th column)
  1. +1 Fist Fighting (1st column)
  2. +5% life leech for Sweeping Takedown (2nd column)
  1. +1 Fist Fighting (2nd column)
  2. 8% crit damage (1st column)
